Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class CampaignSettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.CampaignSettings
public class CampaignSettings extends Metadata

Java class for CampaignSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="CampaignSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="aiAttributionTimeframe" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableAIAttribution" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableAccountsAsCM" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableAutoCampInfluenceDisabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableB2bmaCampaignInfluence2" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableCampaignHistoryTrackEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableCampaignInfluence2" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableCampaignMemberTWCF" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableEKAI" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableSuppressNoValueCI2" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
